meta.description: A monochrome SVG pie chart with labeled segments and percentage labels.

title.description: The title displayed above the pie chart

dataSource.description: The exact name of the registered data source to fetch data points from. Each row must include 'label' (string) and 'value' (number).

dataSourceParams.description: Optional parameters to pass to the data source (e.g., { limit: 5, minValue: 1000 })
